Dear Park Office,

I hope this message finds you well today. We need to check if picnic spots are available soon. Our group plans to gather on a sunny Saturday morning. We will have about twenty friends joining us for fun. Please confirm if our dates are correct and safe. The process requires booking online through a special system. We must select a table before the season starts. This step ensures no one misses out on space. We need chairs, tables, and plenty of shade. Some guests have dietary needs requiring special food options. Kindly verify if these requests can be met easily. We want to avoid any last-minute cancellations or issues.
